title: 7. Infrastructure Metrics
description: CPU utilization, model throughput, OOM failures, pod health, auto-scaling, and API error rates.

options.content:
7
Infrastructure MetricsCPU utilization, model throughput, OOM failures, pod health, auto-scaling, and API error rates.
AI Gateway Telemetry
1. Request & Traffic2. Traffic Analytics3. Latency4. Cost & Usage5. Model Quality6. Safety & Security7. Infrastructure8. Token & Context9. User Observability

panels.title: CPU utilization
panels.description: Average CPU usage per running gateway pod: `rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total) / running_pod_count × 100`.

panels.title: Model throughput
panels.description: Completion (output) tokens per second: `rate(ai_gateway_request_token_total{token_type="completion"})`.

panels.title: OOM failures
panels.description: Container out-of-memory kills in the gateway namespace (`kube_pod_container_oom_killed_total`).

panels.title: Pod/container health
panels.description: Deployment readiness: available replicas ÷ desired replicas × 100.

panels.title: Auto-scaling events
panels.description: HPA scale-up/down events in 24h (`kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_scaling_events_total`).

panels.title: API error rate
panels.description: Gateway API errors: `request_count{status=error}` ÷ total requests × 100.

panels.title: CPU utilization
panels.description: Average CPU usage per running gateway pod: `rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total) / running_pod_count × 100`.

panels.title: Model throughput
panels.description: Completion (output) tokens per second: `rate(ai_gateway_request_token_total{token_type="completion"})`.

panels.title: OOM failures
panels.description: Container out-of-memory kills in the gateway namespace (`kube_pod_container_oom_killed_total`).

panels.title: Pod/container health
panels.description: Deployment readiness: available replicas ÷ desired replicas × 100.

panels.title: Auto-scaling events
panels.description: HPA scale-up/down events in 24h (`kube_horizontalpodautoscaler_scaling_events_total`).

panels.title: API error rate
panels.description: Gateway API errors: `request_count{status=error}` ÷ total requests × 100.

panels.title: HPA Current vs Desired Replicas
panels.description: Horizontal Pod Autoscaler current, desired, min, and max replica counts.

panels.title: Pod Restart Rate
panels.description: Container restart rate per pod — elevated values suggest crash loops.

panels.title: Container Memory RSS by Pod
panels.description: Resident memory (`container_memory_rss`) per ai-gateway pod.

panels.title: Container CPU Usage by Pod
panels.description: CPU cores used per pod (`rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total)`).

panels.title: Node Memory Available Over Time
panels.description: Cluster node memory available vs total — capacity headroom.

panels.title: Node CPU Usage (user mode)
panels.description: Node CPU time in user mode — host-level utilization.

panels.title: Batch Duration Heatmap
panels.description: Distribution of synthetic telemetry runner batch processing times (`ai_telemetry_runner_batch_duration_seconds`).

panels.title: Kafka Queue Depth
panels.description: Current depth of the runner publish queue (`ai_telemetry_runner_kafka_queue_depth` gauge).

panels.title: Runner Event Publish Rate
panels.description: Events published per second (`ai_gateway_request_count_total`) plus publish failures by `reason` when present (`ai_telemetry_runner_publish_errors_total`).

panels.title: Batch Duration p99
panels.description: 99th percentile batch processing duration — tail latency of the telemetry pipeline.

panels.title: Collector Exporter Queue Size
panels.description: OTel Collector exporter queue depth (Tempo, Loki) plus export throughput (spans/s, logs/s) — backpressure and pipeline activity.

panels.title: Collector Export Throughput & Failures
panels.description: Collector export throughput (spans/s, logs/s) and failure rates — shows pipeline activity even when failures are zero.
